title: Images (Pictures) in header and footer
author: joyacv2
body:
Hi!

I see that the &G command script is in the list. Also, see that no images (pictures) cannot be added to header and footer at this time. Do you have an approximate date for this feature?

Thank you very much and have a great day!

comments.author: gbshhennsi
comments.body: Are there any news about images in header and footer?
